distributed_friction.note: Current defended straight-friction lane; pair it with explicit redevelopment and local-loss separation.

direct_nusselt.note: Direct Nu is defended only on left_lower_leg; do not spread it to upcomer or downcomer.

primary_ua_surface.note: Primary thermal state-surface lane for left_lower_leg, test_section_span, left_upper_leg, and upcomer.

secondary_htc_surface.note: Keep as a secondary comparison surface while UA' remains the admitted thermal quantity.

hydraulic.mathematical_form: Positive lumped hydraulic remainder calibrated from CFD
hydraulic.coefficients_or_rule: Start with one residual per case then regress later
hydraulic.validity_window: Until feature path closure and wider straight support exist
hydraulic.recommendation_note: Needed for the hybrid lane, but still calibration-only until refreshed v2 bundle breadth lands.

thermal.mathematical_form: Positive lumped thermal remainder calibrated from CFD heat partition
thermal.coefficients_or_rule: Calibrate from heater cooling and ambient-loss balance
thermal.validity_window: Until wider direct branch thermal support exists
thermal.recommendation_note: Needed for the hybrid lane, but still calibration-only until refreshed v2 bundle breadth lands.

feature_keff_full_path_closure.missing_requirement: full feature-path hydro closure beyond proxy endpoint evidence

water_dependency_package.missing_requirement: closure-gated Water thermal and feature hardening before any Water dependency fit

branch_policy.modeling_note: Best current direct internal HTC and Nu evidence lane; use as the defended direct developing-flow thermal branch.
Carry as a primary UA' or HTC state-surface branch only; direct Nu is not yet defended.
Heating-dominant branch; direct thermal closure is not defended under the current residual and support gates.
Downcomer return branch remains blocked for direct Nu; cooler-adjacent return observables are still missing.
Carry as a primary UA' or HTC state-surface branch only; direct Nu is not yet defended and entry effects remain active.
Derived sensitivity-only branch; model separately from the straight direct branches and consider a convection-cell style closure coupled to the loop state.
Cooler-side branch; direct thermal closure remains blocked and should stay inside the residual bucket for now.

follow_on_gaps.current_gap: Readable external Fluid replay still uses June 19 ethan_cfd_informed_salt_v1 bundle.
follow_on_gaps.why_it_matters: The hybrid CFD-informed lane is not yet scored on the refreshed June 22 closure surface.
follow_on_gaps.next_artifact_or_action: Land a reproducible v2 bundle producer and rerun the Salt campaign under AGENT-102.

follow_on_gaps.current_gap: Only 1 primary comparison hybrid row(s) are readable versus 3 primary frozen references.
follow_on_gaps.why_it_matters: Hybrid-vs-baseline conclusions remain under-supported across Salt 2-4.
follow_on_gaps.next_artifact_or_action: Use the frozen-state rows as a provisional training and scoring surface while continuation-fed breadth is still arriving.

follow_on_gaps.current_gap: Derived upcomer remains sensitivity-only; direct Nu is not defended there.
follow_on_gaps.why_it_matters: Upcomer likely carries buoyancy / recirculation effects beyond straight developing-pipe behavior.
follow_on_gaps.next_artifact_or_action: Prototype a separate upcomer hydraulic penalty or Ri-aware submodel before promoting a global closure.

follow_on_gaps.current_gap: right_leg/downcomer remains blocked for direct internal Nu and cooler-adjacent return observables are still missing.
follow_on_gaps.why_it_matters: The 1D return-leg closure cannot yet be defended from the current branch-resolved CFD evidence alone.
follow_on_gaps.next_artifact_or_action: Preserve cooler-adjacent return diagnostics and keep the downcomer inside residual / lumped closure buckets for now.

follow_on_gaps.current_gap: Feature-path hardening reopened pathwise endpoint decomposition, but continuous field-integral subtraction is still bounded.
follow_on_gaps.why_it_matters: Feature K_eff remains provisional and interacts with straight-section hydraulic closure quality.
follow_on_gaps.next_artifact_or_action: Finish the retained-time feature extractor with hydro integral, p vs p_rgh split, and straight-reference subtraction.
